content.problemStatement: Write a C program that takes input for an array of 5 integers and calculates the sum of all elements in the array. Print the sum.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains exactly five space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case output a single line containing the sum of the five integers.

solution.approach: The task is straightforward: for every test case read the five numbers, add them, and print the result. Since the number of elements per test case is fixed (5), a simple loop of five iterations suffices. This runs in O(5) per test case, i.e., O(T) overall, and uses only a few integer variables, so the memory usage is O(1).
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) total (5 operations per test case).
